visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing an off-the-shoulder light blue knit top over a white top, stands in a warehouse aisle. She holds a large red Starbucks Nespresso variety pack box. The background shows industrial metal shelving stacked with numerous similar red and green coffee boxes. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a large retail warehouse like Costco. (2) The woman moves the box closer to the camera to show the details, specifically pointing with her right index finger to the flavor varieties listed on the front. She has an enthusiastic expression, smiling and widening her eyes to convey excitement. The camera remains in a steady handheld selfie-style position, focused on her and the product. (3) She continues to rotate and gesture towards the box while speaking directly to the camera. Various colorful text overlays in Traditional Chinese appear at the bottom and top of the frame, highlighting price points and deal information. The warehouse setting remains constant with high shelves of inventory visible behind her.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 大家的嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟. [Logo]: @cocowine0205. [Variety]: 太扯趕快買. [Slogan]: 星巴克Nespresso竟然特價. (2) [Subtitle]: Nespresso 竟然特價. (3) [Subtitle]: 不敢相信. (4) [Subtitle]: 買那麼久 從沒看過它特價. (5) [Subtitle]: 好市多竟然特價了. (6) [Subtitle]: 而且是妹妹最愛的太妃口味. (7) [Subtitle]: 是每年聖誕才會出現的太妃. (8) [Subtitle]: 它有40顆太妃加10顆家常跟10顆派克. (9) [Subtitle]: 然後 1,279元 折了260. (10) [Subtitle]: 我們專程跑來 一定要買一盒. (11) [Subtitle]: 一顆只要17塊. [Variety]: 一盒只要17塊. (12) [Subtitle]: 齁 超便宜的耶. (13) [Subtitle]: 我平常它特殊口味 都要29塊. (14) [Subtitle]: 對啊 或者是一般也要20或23. (15) [Subtitle]: 這個口味就是星巴克冬天也有的太妃核桃. (16) [Subtitle]: 主要它上面沒有奶油跟那個脆脆果. (17) [Subtitle]: 沒錯 這是它的無糖版. (18) [Subtitle]: 無糖版對 更值得. (19) [Subtitle]: 它的價格真的很划算. (20) [Subtitle]: 喜歡的人趕快囤貨. (21) [Subtitle]: 沒看過那麼便宜的.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One female presenter is visible in the foreground throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is a young woman with long black hair, wearing an off-the-shoulder light blue knit sweater over a white undergarment.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, characterized by high-reaching industrial metal shelves packed with bulk consumer goods, specifically boxes of Starbucks Nespresso coffee capsules.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a series of high-pitched, staccato vocal chirps used as an attention-grabbing hook. A steady indoor room tone is present. The female speaker's voice is extremely energetic, with a bright, high pitch. (2) An upbeat electronic BGM track fades in, featuring a driving synthesized bass line and a steady 4/4 drum beat. The female speaker begins her enthusiastic delivery, speaking quickly about the Costco discount. A male voice occasionally interjects from a distance with casual comments. (3) Soft digital sound effects punctuate the dialogue, coinciding with visual transitions or text appearances. The background music remains continuous and rhythmic. The voices maintain high clarity despite the warehouse environment, and the speaker’s pitch remains high and varied, conveying surprise and excitement throughout the discussion of prices and flavors.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform viewers about a significant discount on Starbucks Nespresso coffee capsules at Costco. It serves as a personal shopping recommendation, emphasizing the value for money and the scarcity of such sales for this specific brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be a spontaneous consumer review or shopping tip rather than a paid advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy, typical social media shopping vlog focusing on finding bargains at bulk retailers.
